ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality test */,
  "test_parameter" TEXT /* Name of the test parameter (e.g., TotalColiform, E.Coli) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the test parameter */,
  "number_of_samples_tested" INTEGER /* Total number of samples tested for this parameter */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the test parameter */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the test parameter */,
  "maximum_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the test parameter */,
  "number_of_samples_failing" INTEGER /* Number of samples failing EPA standards */,
  "percent_of_samples_failing" REAL /* Percentage of samples failing EPA standards */,
  "epa_drinking_water_std" TEXT /* EPA drinking water standard for the test parameter */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing site where the test was performed */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method used */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_test_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_site_id") REFERENCES testing_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_tests_test_parameter FOREIGN KEY ("test_parameter") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the testing site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "testing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of testing at the site (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the testing site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the testing site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the testing site */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of the water (e.g., river, lake, reservoir) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the testing site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the test parameter (e.g., TotalColiform, E.Coli) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the test parameter */,
  "epa_standard" TEXT /* EPA standard for the test parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test parameter */,
  "parameter_category" TEXT /* Category of the test parameter (e.g., microbial, chemical, physical) */,
  "parameter_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the test parameter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is critical for water quality (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water quality test */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing site */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_value" REAL /* Value of the sample test result */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sample is compliant with EPA standards */,
  "test_result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test result */,
  "test_result_source" TEXT /* Source of the test result (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  "test_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., confirmed, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES water_quality_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES testing_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_parameters" (
  "site_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-parameter relationship */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing site */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test parameter */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the parameter is tested at the site */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test for the parameter at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_parameters_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES testing_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment required for the test method */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Procedure for performing the test method */,
  "method_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the test method */,
  "method_precision" REAL /* Precision of the test method */,
  "method_cost" REAL /* Cost of the test method */,
  "method_duration" INTEGER /* Duration required to perform the test method in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_method_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method assignment */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test parameter */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the test method was assigned to the parameter */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_method_assignments_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_method_assignments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water quality test */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the historical data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the historical data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the historical data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the historical data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES water_quality_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing site */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test parameter */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "compliance_rate" REAL /* Compliance rate for the report period */,
  "number_of_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples tested during the report period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES testing_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
